creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
$ make -C security/p5-Digest-HMAC
===>   p5-Digest-HMAC-1.03_1 depends on file: /usr/local/bin/perl5.16.3 - found
===>  Configuring for p5-Digest-HMAC-1.03_1
Checking if your kit is complete...
Looks good
*** Signal 11

$ perl5 -e 'use POSIX'
Segmentation fault

* thread #1: tid = 101771, 0x0000000000000000, name = 'perl5', stop reason = invalid address (fault address: 0x0)
    frame #0: 0x0000000000000000
-> 0x0:  addb   %al, (%rax)
   0x2:  addb   %al, (%rax)
   0x4:  addb   %al, (%rax)
   0x6:  addb   %al, (%rax)

    frame #14: 0x0000000000400cff perl5`_start(ap=<unavailable>, cleanup=<unavailable>) + 367 at crt1.c:78

$ perl5 -e 'require XSLoader; XSLoader::load("POSIX");'
